title: 2025.3.21Unlocking powerful analytics with Stripe Data Pipeline and Google BigQuerySummary:Discover how to integrate Stripe Data Pipeline with Google Cloud Storage and BigQuery for powerful analytics. This guide walks you through setting up automated data transfers, optimizing reporting, and unlocking valuable insights to enhance your business decisions.Author:Sushant JainTopic:Best PracticesRead
author: Sushant Jain
full_text:
Sushant Jain

Sushant Jain is a software engineer in the Stripe Data Hub team. He works on all the data ingress and egress platforms for Stripe, handling hundreds of terabytes of data transfer every day. Prior to Stripe, Sushant was a Lead Engineer at Yubi and Senior Engineer at Zomato where he built multiple systems from scratch and worked on scaling them for handling massive loads. Sushant is from Delhi and currently lives in Bengaluru.
